Monkey 68 Sushi Restaurant | Modern Asian Flavors

(470) 223-4105
Hours:
Mon: Closed
Tue - Thurs: 5PM - 9PM
Fri - Sat: 5PM - 10PM
Sun: 5PM - 9PM
Sushi + Small Plates
Modern Asian Flavors Takes on Traditional Asian Cuisines
MENU
RESERVATIONS
Come for the food and stay for the experience. Our kitchen takes
traditional Asian ingredients, techniques and flavors to
create innovative dishes
that have redefined our neighborhood.
Curious options await
Come and indulge in the best cocktail and sushi experience in town. We have created exclusive cocktails that are Chinese Zodiac themed, as well as innovative sushi and small plates to pair with them.
Private Parties
Whether you're celebrating the rehearsal dinner before an upcoming wedding, or looking to treat your corporate guests to something different, we've got the perfect space for you.
INQUIRE US
What People Say About Us
When we went, I was expecting some usual sushi spot but no- this was a much more creative take on those Japanese fusion flavors. Everything from the food to drinks were incredibly flavorful. Honestly, I was shocked at the amount of flavor in every bite, from the small apps to the ridiculous amount of sushi rolls we ordered between the group of us. Will absolutely be returning! If you are a true foodie in love with the presentation and creation of food, this place will win you over.
Hibbah A - Yelp
Hibbah A.

Write about something you know. If you don’t know much about a specific topic, invite an expert to write about it. Having a variety of authors in your blog is a great way to keep visitors engaged. You know your audience better than anyone else, so keep them in mind as you write your blog posts. Write about things they care about. If you have a company Facebook page that gets lots of comments, you can look here to find topics to write about.

By Richard Lee

March 28, 2022
There are so many good reasons to communicate with site visitors.                                                                  Tell them about sales and new products or update them with tips and information.                                                                                                  Here are some reasons to make blogging part of your regular routine.                                                                               Blogging is an easy way to engage with site visitors.                                                                               Writing a blog post is easy once you get the hang of it.                                                                  Posts don’t need to be long or complicated. Just write about what you know, and do your best to write well.                                                                   ﻿                                                                  Show customers your personality                                                      When you write a blog post, you can really let your personality shine through. This can be a great tool for showing your distinct personality.                                                      Blogging is a terrific form of communication                                                      Blogs are a great communication tool. meta.meta_description: Discover innovative dishes at Monkey 68, a sushi restaurant in Roswell and Alpharetta. Enjoy traditional Asian flavors with a modern twist. Book now!
